description_long: This is a rectangular, upright beverage carton with a predominantly white and blue color scheme, featuring a printed image of red apples and a splash of water on the front. The front label reads 'Paradise apple' in large, bold blue letters, with additional branding and nutritional information visible on the sides and back. The carton is topped with a small, white plastic screw cap located at one corner of the top surface, which is slightly angled. The sides of the carton display barcodes, recycling symbols, and detailed product information in fine print. The surface of the carton appears to be made of laminated paperboard, giving it a semi-glossy finish. The overall shape is a tall, rectangular prism with a flat base, designed for easy handling and pouring.
description: A tall, rectangular beverage carton with a white plastic screw cap, blue and white branding, and apple imagery on the front.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow edge of the carton with partial branding and a glimpse of the cap at the top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'Paradise apple' branding, apple imagery, and the main product label.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a barcode, recycling symbols, and additional product information.
description_view_3: Back view featuring detailed nutritional facts and fine print text covering most of the surface.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label features 'Paradise apple' in large blue letters, with a red apple image and a splash of water. Top left has a red logo. Sides and back have nutritional facts, barcode, recycling symbols, and fine print in black and blue text.
attribute_cap_type: White plastic screw cap, small and round, located at one top corner, with ridged edges for grip.
attribute_transparency: Opaque; the carton material does not allow visibility of the liquid inside.
attribute_bottle_neck_design: Short, slightly raised neck at one top corner, with threading for the screw cap and a subtle flare at the base of the neck.
